title: Implement expand-migrate-contract DB migration strategy
summary: Review #2 following external feedback from sourcery-ai[bot]. Changes address two suggestions: (1) extract shared Job construction into buildDBJob to eliminate drift between buildDBSyncJob and buildUpgradeJob, and (2) centralize duplicated condition-setting into setUpgradePhaseRunning and setUpgradeJobFailed helpers replacing 6 inline SetCondition calls. A minor doc typo was also fixed. All changes are behavior-preserving mechanical refactoring verified by passing tests.

tests_checklist.item: All unit tests pass (go test ./internal/controller/... — 0.74s, all PASS)
Upgrade phase tests cover expand/migrate/contract in-progress and failed paths via helpers
TestBuildUpgradeJobs verifies name, image, command, security context, config volume for all 3 phases
TestBuildDBSyncJob_SecurityContext still passes after buildDBJob extraction
Edge cases covered (tag change during upgrade, invalid version, skip-level rejection)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing sub-reconciler condition contract pattern
Helper functions are small and single-purpose
No code duplication — 6 inline calls replaced by 2 helpers
buildDBJob consolidates shared Job spec preventing drift
Naming follows existing conventions (unexported helpers, verb+noun)

security_checklist.item: restrictedSecurityContext() still applied to all Job containers via buildDBJob
No secrets in condition messages or logs

architecture_checklist.item: Refactoring is behavior-preserving — condition Reason/Message values match originals exactly
buildDBJob parameters cover all variation points (imageTag, nameSuffix, command)
Helper placement is correct — same file, near callers

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No duplicated Job construction logic (buildDBJob shared)
No over-abstraction — helpers accept concrete parameters, no unnecessary interfaces

fail_fast_checklist.item: Upgrade errors still propagate immediately with wrapped error context
Condition set before error return in all paths

defensive_checklist.item: All condition fields (Type, Status, ObservedGeneration, Reason, Message) still populated
Error parameter in setUpgradeJobFailed is %v formatted — no panic on nil

suggested_improvements: The TODO(CC-0042) at reconcile_database.go:411 was moved from the old buildDBSyncJob body to the buildDBJob docstring. This consolidation of two duplicate TODOs into one is an improvement. No action needed in this PR — tracked by CC-0042.
